name: Mocha Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Hot Fudge Ice Cream Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round pans.
3. Prepare, bake, and cool cake following package directions.
4. For filling, combine hot fudge topping and coffee crystals in a medium saucepan.
5. Heat until coffee crystals are dissolved.
6. Cool mixture.
7. Fold 2 cups whipped topping into the fudge topping mixture.
8. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
9. Place one cake layer on serving plate.
10. Spread with 1 cup of filling.
11. Top with second cake layer.
12. Add remaining 2 cups whipped topping to the remaining filling.
13. Frost top and sides of cake with topping mixture.
14. Garnish with chocolate curls, coated coffee beans, or grated chocolate.
